localized_texts.text: SkyPark Observation Deck at Marina Bay Sands 滨海湾金沙空中花园

Sitting atop the 56-story megastructure, the SkyPark Observation Deck gives you a view of the best sites of Lion City unobstructed! Step into the building’s giant platform and easily spot landmarks such as the Singapore Flyer, Merlion Statue, and Esplanade, among others, through its clear glass railings. See Gardens by the Bay stand out from the rest of the city and the Spectra show lighting up the night from a 200-feet elevation. Afterwards, you can opt to dine at a rooftop restaurant while you enjoy the iconic sights.
Incredible views of Singapore
A fantastic place to have a drink and enjoy great city and bay garden views
Take in a bird’s-eye view of Gardens by the Bay and the impressive Supertree Grove, or spot Singapore's iconic landmarks from above.

Take in a bird’s-eye view of Gardens by the Bay and the impressive Supertree Grove, or spot Singapore's iconic landmarks from above. Admire the durian-shaped domes of the Esplanade and catch a glimpse of the Merlion.
Operation Hours: Please kindly visit Marina Bay Sands SkyPark Observation Deck official website for any updates of operation hours.
Weather: Sands SkyPark is an unsheltered area and subject to inclement weather.
Weather: Should extreme rain or lightning occur, Sands SkyPark may be closed temporarily for the safety of guests.
Restrictions: All guests may be subject to a search, including bags, clothes and other possessions, when entering SkyPark Observation Deck.
Dresscode: Casual wear recommended. Guests must wear footwear. Going barefoot is not permitted.
Accessibility: SkyPark is wheelchair accessible. Guests are kindly advised to approach our staff for assistance before entry.
What’s included: Admission Ticket for SkyPark Observation Deck
How to use: Show Mobile Ticket: at the entrance of SkyPark for admission

Terms & Conditions: Admission Tickets are valid for entry on the selected date and time only. Tickets are for single entry only. Entry is subject to availability and deck capacity (wait time may apply). Management reserves the right to reject entry for guests arriving after 4 PM. Opening hours may vary on certain dates. Please check the official website for closure dates before your visit. Only guests who have been on the Observation Deck for less than one (1) hour when it closes due to weather are entitled to a refund. No refund will be provided to guests denied entry or escorted out for non-compliance.Eligibility Adult Rate: Guests aged 13–59 years old. Concession Tickets: Applicable for Senior Citizens above 60 years old, students, children aged 2–12 years old, Persons with Disabilities (PWD), and NSF. Free Admission: Children below 2 years old. Everyone else must have a valid ticket for entry.Attraction Access The Observation Deck may be closed due to inclement weather (rain or lightning). Management reserves the right to close the deck as deemed necessary. Visitors typically spend 45 minutes to 1 hour on the deck. Magic Shot/Photo location: Queue Line @ Level B1 (SkyPark). Magic Shot is a GIF with animated background/effects added to the photo taken. Guests are not permitted to bring luggage onto the Observation Deck. Luggage may be checked at the Guest Services Desk (Porte Cochere, Tower 3) and is subject to security screening.Additional Information The SkyPark is wheelchair-accessible. Guests are advised to approach staff for assistance before entry. All guests may be subject to security checks, including bags and personal belongings, upon entry or exit. Guests must wear footwear at all times (bare feet are not permitted).Important Notes Throwing any items over the edge of the Observation Deck is strictly prohibited. Guests found violating rules may be removed and handed over to the Police. Loitering is not permitted. Guests who fail to comply with the rules may be denied entry or escorted out without refund. Admission is subject to the Conditions of Entry of Marina Bay Sands and the seller.Revised route to SkyPark Observation Deck: From Bayfront MRT, kindly exit B & take the escalator on the left to ground level 1. From ground level 1, turn right and walk along the outer side of the hotel from tower 1 to tower 3 – SkyPark Observation Deck.In case of rain, guests will need to access the Observation Deck via the following route: From Bayfront MRT, kindly exit C to Mall B2M Proceed to the end of the mall B2M (HUGO BOSS) From HUGO BOSS, take escalator on the right to Tower 3 – SkyPark Observation Deck.
Cancellation Policy: No cancellation for this activity as per vendor policy
